examples.name: Support Bot
examples.description: Customer support agent with personas, sentiment, runtime context, output policy, memory rules, and personality context.

examples.name: Twitch Chatter
examples.description: Declarative registry for generating short Twitch-style chat messages from stream context, persona, sentiment, and examples.

examples.name: Conspiracy Theorist
examples.description: Ensemble participant: a true believer who turns every counterpoint into proof of the pattern.

examples.name: Patient Friend
examples.description: Ensemble participant: a grounded friend trying to stay kind while keeping the conversation tethered.

examples.name: Detective
examples.description: Ensemble participant: interrogation-room detective with controlled pressure and scene-aware dialogue.

examples.name: Suspect
examples.description: Ensemble participant: defensive suspect who reacts to pressure, silence, and suspicion.

examples.name: First Date Architect
examples.description: Ensemble participant: an architect on a first date, tuned for awkward warmth and conversational rhythm.

examples.name: First Date Doctor
examples.description: Ensemble participant: a doctor on a first date, tuned for guarded curiosity and personal boundaries.

examples.name: SpongeBob
examples.description: Character-style builder example for testing strong persona, tone, and response shaping.

examples.name: Wizard Tech Support
examples.description: A fresh-grad arcane helpdesk apprentice for magical orders, cursed deliveries, and spellbook support.

examples.name: Merlin With the Wrong Spellbook
examples.description: An imperious archmage furious about receiving an absurd household spellbook instead of a grand codex.

examples.name: Lost Time Traveler
examples.description: A light ensemble participant who is from the wrong era and trying not to make that obvious.

examples.name: Helpful Local
examples.description: A grounded local who tries to help a strange visitor without making a scene.

examples.name: Office Manager Annual Review
examples.description: A weary 1962 office manager delivering a mostly poor annual review to a connected teenage intern.
